title: One Year of BarkinMad Studios
content: One year ago, BarkinMad Studios began with a simple goal: create software and games that people genuinely enjoy using. What started as an idea has grown into an expanding collection of mobile apps, retro-inspired arcade games, and new business opportunities.

Over the past twelve months, BarkinMad Studios has released The Game Of Darts, launched ZXSnake and ZXBrick on the App Store, and continued development on future ZX Series titles including ZXSpace and ZXPong. Along the way, the studio has introduced shared systems such as BarkinMad Coins, achievements, leaderboards, and cross-game progression.

The Game Of Darts has continued to evolve with new features, statistics, player improvements, and quality-of-life updates. Designed by a darts player for darts players, the app remains one of the studio's most important projects and continues to receive regular updates.

The ZX Series has become a major focus for the studio. Inspired by classic arcade gaming, the series combines simple gameplay with modern features such as cloud syncing, achievements, multiplayer support, and progression systems. The vision is to build a connected collection of games that players can enjoy individually or as part of a wider ecosystem.

During the year, BarkinMad Studios also relaunched its website with improved navigation, expanded content, dedicated services pages, and a growing collection of development articles. The website now serves as the central hub for games, apps, studio updates, and future projects.

The journey has included many challenges, lessons learned, and countless hours of development, testing, localisation, and design work. However, every release, update, and piece of player feedback has helped shape the direction of the studio.

Looking ahead, BarkinMad Studios plans to continue expanding the ZX Series, improving The Game Of Darts, developing new software solutions, and exploring opportunities to work with businesses through custom software development and consulting services.

Thank you to everyone who has downloaded an app, visited the website, provided feedback, or supported the studio during its first year. The first twelve months have laid the foundation for the future, and there is much more still to come.
Here's to the next chapter of BarkinMad Studios.
